title: Philosophy-scan subagent in the Setup Grill
description: Before the philosophy question, the Setup Skill spawns a read-only subagent to sweep the target codebase (readmes, contributor docs, configs, prior documentation) and return philosophy candidates. Candidates are presented as confirmable proposals; the scan never writes PHILOSOPHY.md. Acceptance: a scratch run against a codebase with existing conventions surfaces at least its documented ones as proposals.
notes: AFK. Covers PRD-001 stories 1, 2. Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_1 item S1-3); acceptance verified by invocation against terminal-game.
